tasks.subject: Fix Go compilation errors in ctxharvester, repograph, projects, and harnesses packages
tasks.description:
Resolve compilation errors preventing Go build success:
1. ctxharvester/pruner.go: scoredChunk redeclared, undefined: strings
2. repograph/graph.go: fmt imported and not used, NodeType redeclared
3. projects/tracker.go: undefined: fmt
4. harnesses/skill_store.go: Skill redeclared
5. harnesses/assimilator.go: declared and not used: info

tasks.subject: Fix Go compilation errors in ctxharvester package
tasks.description: Fix the redeclaration of scoredChunk and missing strings import in go/internal/ctxharvester/pruner.go

tasks.description: Fix compilation errors in go/internal/ctxharvester/pruner.go: redeclared scoredChunk and undefined strings import.

tasks.activeForm: Fixing Go compilation errors in ctxharvester package

tasks.subject: Design the new monorepo folder structure
tasks.description: Create a plan for reorganizing the monorepo into 5 top-level project domains: hypercode, hypermcp, hypermem, hyperingest, hyperharness. Each with research/, packages/go/, packages/ts/ subfolders. Map every current file/folder to its new location.

tasks.subject: Relocate git submodules to domain research/ folders
tasks.description: Use git submodule deinit + add (or mv) to relocate each submodule to its correct domain's research/ folder. Submodules: hyperharness→hyperharness/research/, prism-mcp→hypermcp/research/, litellm→hyperingest/research/, mcpproxy→hypermcp/research/, MetaMCP→hypermcp/research/, claude-mem→hypermem/research/, OmniRoute→hyperingest/research/, maestro→hypercode/research/, cloud-orchestrator→hypercode/research/

tasks.subject: Relocate TypeScript packages to domain packages/ts/ folders
tasks.description: Move each TS package from packages/ to the correct domain's packages/ts/ folder. Update all import paths, workspace references, tsconfig paths, and package.json dependencies.

tasks.subject: Relocate Go packages to domain packages/go/ folders
tasks.description: Move each Go internal package from go/internal/ to the correct domain's packages/go/ folder. Each domain gets its own go.mod or they share via Go workspace (go.work).

tasks.subject: Relocate apps, scripts, docs, and root config
tasks.description: Move apps/ (web, maestro, etc.) to hypercode/apps/, move scripts/, docs/, data/ to shared infra. Update root config files (package.json, pnpm-workspace.yaml, turbo.json, start.bat/sh).

tasks.subject: Fix all cross-references and verify builds
tasks.description: After all moves: fix pnpm-workspace.yaml, tsconfig references, Go import paths, build scripts, start.bat/sh. Verify TypeScript builds and Go builds pass.
